assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddOidcStateDataFormatterCache with the 'corporate-idp' scheme to use server-side state storage
assertions.rationale: Program.cs does NOT call AddOidcStateDataFormatterCache. Instead it uses AddDistributedMemoryCache and SaveTokens = false, which don't solve the state length problem. The response mentions needing a custom ISecureDataFormat but doesn't know the Duende-specific API.

assertions.assertion: The external login trigger stores returnUrl in AuthenticationProperties.Items before calling Challenge
assertions.rationale: ExternalLoginModel stores { "returnUrl", returnUrl } in AuthenticationProperties.Items before Challenge.

assertions.assertion: The callback handler retrieves returnUrl from result.Properties.Items after authenticating against the external cookie scheme
The returnUrl is validated using Url.IsLocalUrl or _interaction.IsValidReturnUrl before redirecting after the callback
assertions.rationale: Callback calls Redirect(returnUrl) without any Url.IsLocalUrl or IsValidReturnUrl validation.
